title: ICA-RAG: Information Completeness Guided Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Disease Diagnosis

defines.name: ICA-RAG
defines.definition: A disease diagnosis RAG framework that uses information completeness to decide when retrieval is needed and to prioritize informative text units during retrieval.

problem: Existing RAG methods retrieve indiscriminately for medical diagnosis, causing unnecessary computation and noisy retrieval that can hurt diagnostic accuracy.
